prd.oneLiner: Provide one workflow for request creation, evidence, approval routing, budget validation, approval history, and reporting.
prd.goal: Move 90% of expense requests to electronic approval and reduce average approval lead time by 30%.
prd.whyNow: Expense evidence and approval history are spread across email and files, making budget checks and audit trails difficult.
prd.problem: Expense evidence and approval history are spread across email and files, making budget checks and audit trails difficult.
prd.solution: Provide one workflow for request creation, evidence, approval routing, budget validation, approval history, and reporting.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee requester
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Expense evidence and approval history are spread across email and files, making budget checks and audit trails difficult.

targets.name: Finance and approval operator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Expense evidence and approval history are spread across email and files, making budget checks and audit trails difficult.

scenarios.text: Employee requester completes expense request and evidence submission and checks progress.
Finance and approval operator reviews department, category, and approval operations reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Move 90% of expense requests to electronic approval and reduce average approval lead time by 30%.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: My expense requests and approval status
Approval routing, approval or rejection, and budget validation
Department, category, and approval operations reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
